articles.title: Quote of the day by Denzel Washington
articles.description: Denzel Washington, a true Hollywood standard, inspires aspiring artists with his powerful message on commitment and consistency. He emphasizes that success isn't easy, highlighting that struggle builds excellence and drives progress. Washington's legendary career and dedication to mentoring underscore his philosophy: "Without commitment, you will never start, but more importantly, without consistency, you will never finish."

articles.title: Navy SEAL Robert Harward‚Äôs face glitches on live tv? Terrifying 'fox news' interview goes mega viral
articles.description: Retired U.S. Vice Admiral Robert Harward has gone viral after a Fox News appearance sparked bizarre conspiracy theories online. While Harward was discussing Donald Trump‚Äôs Iran strategy, sanctions on Tehran and America‚Äôs military pressure campaign, social media users became fixated on something entirely different - his face. Several users on X claimed the former Navy SEAL looked ‚Äúunnatural‚ÄĚ during the interview and questioned whether he was wearing a realistic mask on live television. Some compared the viral clip to old internet conspiracy theories involving actor Jim Carrey, while others pointed to Harward‚Äôs ears and facial structure as ‚Äúevidence.‚ÄĚ The speculation spread rapidly across social media, overshadowing Harward‚Äôs actual comments on the U.S.-Iran conflict. During the Fox News segment, Harward argued that Trump held the upper hand against Iran through sanctions, economic pressure and a naval blockade. He claimed Tehran was being pushed toward ‚Äúcapitulation‚ÄĚ and highlighted growing economic instability inside Iran.

articles.title: Sehaj Rrajput remembers breaking down while shooting the domestic violence track for Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
articles.description: In the gripping storyline of Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile, Sehaj Rrajput brings to life Unnati, a woman standing up against the harrowing tides of domestic abuse. Her journey for justice against her husband is not only heart-wrenching but also a testament to her unwavering spirit.

articles.title: Kangana Ranaut Reacts to Wedding Buzz After Viral Mangalsutra Video; Here‚Äôs What She Said

articles.title: Suriya's Karuppu Becomes First Tamil Film In 9 Months To Cross Rs 100 Crore Mark

articles.title: ‚ÄėPeople look at me as if I have come from another dimension‚Äô: Ravi Kishan on going viral for his ‚Äėhome from work‚Äô statement

Kishan admitted he often trends on social media for verbal mishaps. He was on his way to Parliament when the slip occurred. The actor-politician stated that making mistakes is human.

articles.title: Hear, there, everywhere: How Miles Davis left his mark on the Global South
